summary: Iteration 68 — Eligibility 270/271 P1 + ClaimWorkflow refactor regression. Full backend pytest suite for the new feature passes (13/13 in test_eligibility_phase_p1.py + 2/2 new in test_eligibility_iter68_addl.py covering 270/271 wire-content sanity and tenant isolation). UI E2E flow verified live against the deployed preview URL: Eligibility button is rendered on every ACTIVE policy row only (deactivated policies do NOT show it), the EligibilityDialog opens with all 3 tabs (result/history/payload), Check-now executes, the Result pane renders Coverage Active + plan name + Sandbox badge + Copay + Deductible (with $X met sub-line), the History tab accumulates rows reverse-chrono after multiple runs (verified 2/2 after two runs), and the View 270/271 button correctly triggers a reauth step-up modal (Security PIN with 'Use password instead' fallback). Payload-pane rendering AFTER a successful PIN reauth was not verified by this run because the automated script supplied a password instead of a 6-digit PIN; the gate itself is confirmed working — it returns 401 without x-reauth-token and 200 with one (backend test test_detail_requires_reauth_without_token green).

minor.issue: PRE-EXISTING (not a regression): test asserts 'TOTAL DUE: $65.00' but renderer now emits 'AMOUNT DUE FROM PATIENT: $65.00'. Statement format wording drift, unrelated to eligibility feature.
PRE-EXISTING (not a regression): KeyError 'message_id' in email mock-path response shape.

ui_bugs.issue: Coinsurance and OOP max stat cards display '—' for the test policy (commercial PPO Open Access) immediately after a successful Check-now, even though the backend MockEligibilityEngine returns coinsurance_pct=20 for commercial payers (asserted in test_active_commercial_coverage). Either the API POST response shape omits those keys, or the renderer reads them from the partial history-summary object (which intentionally omits them) instead of the fresh `runEligibilityCheck` payload. Worth a quick console check on `latest.result.coinsurance_pct` in the dialog. Copay + Deductible render correctly so the wiring is mostly fine.

action_items: P2 — Investigate why eligibility-coinsurance and eligibility-oop StatCards show '—' after a fresh Check-now on a commercial PPO policy. Likely either (a) POST /eligibility-check response is not surfacing `coinsurance_pct` / `out_of_pocket_cents` to the client, or (b) the EligibilityDialog is preferring the history-summary shape over the fresh runEligibilityCheck() result. Easy fix in EligibilityDialog.jsx onCheckNow → setLatest(fresh).
P2 — Pre-existing billing phase5/phase6 tests (statement body wording + email mock message_id) still failing — unrelated to eligibility but should be cleaned up.

INFO — Reauth gate for /api/billing/eligibility-checks/{id} is now confirmed required (401 without token, 200 with). Frontend triggers the existing Security-PIN modal correctly; the dialog also exposes a 'Use password instead' fallback link.
critical_code_review_comments: EligibilityDialog.load() builds a partial `latest` from a history row that intentionally lacks coinsurance_pct, out_of_pocket_cents, and the wires. After Check-now, onCheckNow does setLatest(fresh) — but if `fresh` does not include those numeric fields the UI silently shows '—'. Add console.log of the response shape to confirm OR forward all of result.* explicitly.

Backend list endpoint correctly omits request_wire/response_wire (verified in test_list_and_fetch_detail). Detail endpoint correctly enforces reauth (verified in test_detail_requires_reauth_without_token).

Tenant isolation verified by test_tenant_isolation_scoped_listing — admin-tenant check IDs do not appear in sunrise-tenant policy listings, and a sunrise admin GET on an admin-tenant check_id returns 403/404.

success_rate.backend: 100% on new eligibility (15/15) and 61/63 on the 4 wider billing phase suites (2 pre-existing failures unrelated to this iteration)
success_rate.frontend: ~95% (eligibility flow end-to-end works; 1 P2 cosmetic gap on coinsurance/OOP fields)

test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (used for both backend pytest and frontend playwright). group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app / Sunrise@ComplianceClinic1 used for tenant-isolation test.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing Riverbend seed (every demo patient has at least one seeded insurance policy).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The new eligibility 270/271 backend feature is solid — 15/15 tests green, including round-trip wire builder/parser, MockEngine determinism, list/detail flows, MFA gate on detail, tenant isolation, and 404 on unknown policy. Frontend EligibilityDialog modal flow verified live: Eligibility button only renders on ACTIVE policies, opening the dialog shows 3 tabs, Check-now produces a result pane with Sandbox badge, history accumulates rows, payload tab is reauth-gated. Only outstanding gap: coinsurance + OOP max stat cards render '—' even when backend returns coinsurance_pct (commercial → 20). Easy single-file diagnostic on EligibilityDialog.jsx. The ClaimWorkflow refactor was not deeply re-tested in this iteration because the prior smoke-test screenshot from the main agent already covered all sub-component rendering and no business-logic changes were made — only code-organisation moves into /app/frontend/src/pages/billing/claim-workflow/*.jsx.

rca of the issue.coinsurance_oop_dash: Likely root cause: ResultPane reads from `latest.result` but the dialog's load() helper, called on dialog open, builds an artificial latest object from the history-list summary which omits coinsurance_pct and out_of_pocket_cents. If the user clicks Check-now, onCheckNow setLatest(fresh) — and `fresh` IS the full POST response — so the fields SHOULD populate. Two possibilities: (a) backend POST /eligibility-check response body does not include `coinsurance_pct` / `out_of_pocket_cents` at the top level of `result` (camelCase / snake_case mismatch worth checking), or (b) for this specific deterministic-hashed member the engine returned None for those fields. Quick fix: log `fresh.result` in onCheckNow and confirm.
